chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1081 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4504/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16.08.2023 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with ASI Muhabat Ali and ASI Dhani Bux Bhutto >>>>>>>...<<<<<<< Learned AAG Sindh has filed statement of SSP, Sukkur along with a copy of report under Section 173, Cr.P.C in Crime No.32/2023 under Section 324, 353, 399, 402, 148 & 149 PPC registered at Police Station, Tamachani Sukkur, for quashment of which this petition has been filed. Since challan has been submitted, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition and states that he would avail identical remedy before the trial Court by moving a relevant application. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in the above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
